_readme: Hand-editable AI tuning file — ships with the game and is read at startup.
Put entries in 'parameters' to override the AI's built-in scoring weights, e.g.:
Every tunable parameter (all 91), its default and what it does is documented in docs/AI_TUNING.md.
Layering: values here override the code defaults; user://ai_config.json (exported by the
AI Gameplay Visualizer) overrides this file; per-player profiles (user://ai_profiles/) and
their conditional rules override everything. Only 'parameters' is read — keys starting
with '_' are ignored, so keep notes wherever you like.
Leave 'parameters' empty to play with the built-in defaults.
